# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:18

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    curl \
    git \
    wget \
    unzip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    make \
    gcc \
    g++ \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
